_comment: Authoritative leadership stack for /organisation. Build script (tools/build_org_data.py) reads this and emits it under data.leaders. Names + scopes here are the single source of truth — they override anything derivable from the roster manager column. Source: keka_roster_full.csv at engineering-os/docs/onboarding/, joined on the 'CXO's' column (the people who appear there are the authoritative C-suite).
_history: 2026-05-03 round 3: refreshed from keka_roster_full.csv. Founders are self-reporting nodes (Farooq + SMG = Sreeraman); C-suite is everyone whose Reporting To is a founder. Roles like CTPO / COO / CBO derived from Job Title.
